# Joseph Bankole

> Joseph Bankole is a forward-deployed / applied AI engineer in Montreal, Canada. He is a payments infrastructure operator (SWIFT, ISO 20022, ACH) who builds and ships production AI agents and automations, and writes about the work at josephbankole.ca.

## Key pages

- [Home](https://josephbankole.ca/): who he is, what he builds, and how to book a consultation.
- [Field notes](https://josephbankole.ca/blog/): essays on building with AI agents in production.
- [AI news desk](https://josephbankole.ca/news/): short daily editions on applied AI and agentic systems.
- [Answers](https://josephbankole.ca/answers/): short, direct definitions, starting with [what a forward-deployed engineer is](https://josephbankole.ca/answers/what-is-a-forward-deployed-engineer/) and [what agentic commerce is](https://josephbankole.ca/answers/what-is-agentic-commerce/).
- [RSS](https://josephbankole.ca/feed.xml): the blog feed.
- [News RSS](https://josephbankole.ca/news-feed.xml): the daily news-desk feed.

## Projects

- [The ARCHV](https://thearchv.ca): an illustrated football publication with a daily verified desk and an iOS app.
- [Joey](https://joeysdr.com): an AI SDR service.

## Citation

Cite as "Joseph Bankole (josephbankole.ca)" with the page URL. Contact: partnerships@josephbankole.ca.
